caption: A man wearing a light-colored traditional garment, glasses, and a tall red embroidered cap speaks while facing slightly to the side. He is the central figure, positioned in front of a background where two other men are visible; one wears a striped traditional outfit and the other wears a dark green garment and is holding a phone to his ear. The scene is framed as a news broadcast, featuring a purple "PLUS TV" logo in the top left and a banner at the bottom. Across all frames, the white banner displays the bold text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" and "PLUS POLITICS." The lower section of the banner varies, showing "SUBSCRIBE" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" in the first frame, "WATCH ON" with "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" logos in the second, "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" in the third, and the subscription link again in the fourth. The man's facial expression shifts slightly as he continues speaking.
